args.text: Both auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9) confirmed patched.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: auth-api and session-store are now running v5.8.4 and v2.2.9 respectively, resolving CVE-2026-30117. Verification recorded in patch-verification.md.

args.text: Credential rotation complete: active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediating CVE-2026-30117, signing keys have been rotated and all refresh tokens invalidated. You'll need to sign in again.
